subcodes.first_line: The book thou didst send hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and the servant standing before His Face hath made mention thereof, attaining thereby the grace of His hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک و ذکره العبد الحاضر لدی الوجه و فاز باصغاء من عنده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
